name: Do I need a lawyer to check ChatGPT legal docs before signing?
description: Yes, AI errors common; attorney review essential.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer to check ChatGPT legal docs before signing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, AI errors common; attorney review essential.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, always have a licensed attorney review. Context: AI lacks jurisdiction knowledge, hallucinates cases; not legal advice. Key factors: State-specific laws vary, errors common in citations. Practical guidance: Get attorney review for $200-500/hour, compare AI output manually. Better safe than lawsuit.
